site.title: At The In Gate USHJA Zone Show Schedule
site.description: Hunter jumper horse show schedule organized by USHJA zone.

shows.title: ESE Heritage Show I
shows.program: Zone 1 Horse of the Year Hunter, Equitation, and Hunter Breeding Championship
shows.description: USHJA Zone 1 HOTY hunter, equitation, and hunter breeding championship at ESE Heritage Show I.

shows.program: Zone 1 Horse of the Year Jumper Championship
shows.description: USHJA Zone 1 HOTY jumper championship at Fieldstone Northeast Classic.

shows.title: Saratoga Summer
shows.program: Zone 2 Horse of the Year and Equitation Championship
shows.description: USHJA Zone 2 HOTY hunter, jumper, equitation, hunter breeding, and equitation medal championship at Saratoga Summer.

shows.description: USHJA Zone 5 HOTY hunter, jumper, and equitation championship at Showplace Fall Classic.

shows.description: USHJA Zone 5 Horsemanship Class at WEC Midwest Indoors I.

shows.title: Princeton Show Jumping Summer II
shows.program: USHJA Zone Jumper Championship choice location
shows.description: USHJA notes that athletes from Zones 11 and 12 may qualify and apply to attend the Zone Jumper Championship location of their choosing. Princeton Show Jumping Summer II is one listed 2026 championship site.

shows.title: National Sunshine Series I
shows.program: USHJA Zone Jumper Championship choice location
shows.description: USHJA notes that athletes from Zones 11 and 12 may qualify and apply to attend the Zone Jumper Championship location of their choosing. National Sunshine Series I is one listed 2026 championship site.
